steps: Evaluate the experimental parameters below %s %s
Thaw the following reagents and keep On ice . %s %s
Put centrifuges at 4 °C and heat block at 65 °C .
Reserve deep well PCR block.
Resuspend nuclei in PBS/BSA (0,04% BSA).
Pre-heat block at 37 °C .
Perform nuclei count.
Meanwhile, prepare ATAC TD Buffer (ATD) and ATAC Reaction Mix (ARM). %s %s %s %s
Pippette the ARM mix gently to mix all the content.
Incubate the ATAC Reaction Mix for 01:00:00 at 37 °C without shaking.
Turn on pumps and microscope lamp.
Prepare program on PCR block.
Place cold block or ice box and PCR tubes in position.
Place chip and connect outlet tubing.
Load the beads and put in the bead slot.
Take 1x 3 mL syringe and fill with silicone oil. Connect tubing and pipet tip and prime.
Take 1x 3 mL syringe and fill with mineral oil. Connect tubing and pipet tip and prime.
Take 1x 3 mL syringe and fill with droplet oil. Connect tubing, put in oil pump and prime.
Create new directory for pictures of the run and change picture output path.
Prepare the PCR mix as below (add PCR enzymes and nuclei only after other ingredients are mixed). %s %s
Perform HyDrop run with following flow rates: %s %s
After the run, perform the linear amplification using the PCR program below: if emulsion comes above border of PCR, take away oil from below %s %s
Thaw GITC Buffer at 65 °C for 00:10:00 and bring to Room temperature , check if precipitate is gone. If none is available in freezer, prepare GITC Buffer as below. %s %s
Make clean up mix: %s %s
Prepare EB-DTT-TW buffer: %s %s
Add 125 µL of recovery agent, gently invert 10 times.
Incubate for 00:01:00 and spin down the tubes.
Discard recovery agent from bottom of tubes.
Add 200 µL of the cleanup mix using P200 pippette.
Incubate the mix for 00:10:00 with mixing every 5 minutes.
Resuspend in 40.5 µL of EB-DTT and take 40 µL eluate to the next step.
Perform the purification as recommended by the manufacturer.
Add 1.2X volume of Ampure beads ( 60 µL ).
Pull beads to the sides on magnetic rack, transfer 50 µL of the elute to a new PCR tube.
Incubate for 00:02:00 .
Spin down pellet and resuspend in 50.5 µL of the EB-DTT-Tween.
Air-dry dry magnetic pellet for no more than 00:01:00 .
Remove supernatant and repeat the above 80% EtOH wash one additional time.
Add 300 µL of 80% EtOH for 00:00:30 without disturbing pellet.
Pull beads to the sides on magnetic rack and remove supernatant.
Prepare the following PCR mix %s %s
Mix the contents well and proceed to amplification: %s %s
After the PCR, add 40 µL of Ampure XP beads (0.4x purification to remove big fragments).
Magnetise and transfer all clear supernatant to a new PCR tube.
Add 80 µL of Ampure beads to the clear supernatant and mix well.
Incubate the mix for 00:05:00 .
Prepare fresh 80% EtOH. %s %s
Pull beads to the sides on magnetic rack.
Add 200 µL of 80% EtOH for 00:00:30 without disturbing pellet.
Remove supernatant and repeat 80% EtOH wash.
Air-dry dry magnetic pellet for no more than 2 minutes.
Spin down pellet and resuspend in 20.5 µL of the EB.
Incubate for 00:05:00 .
Pull beads to the sides on magnetic rack and transfer 20 µL to a new PCR tube.
Perform Qbit and Bioanalyzer.
Prepare nuclei with your nuclei extraction protocol of choice
creator: Koen Theunis
